Internal Legal & Compliance Memo — SkyPine Materials JSC (HOSE issuer), to Board Audit & Risk Committee — 30 May 2026
Subject: Decree 13 personal data compliance; cross‑border HR transfer to Singapore; MNPI controls for upcoming securities disclosure
DSAR: Received from Mr. Nguyen Van Soan (retail shareholder) re KYC files held by Amber Reef Securities Co.; ticket DP-REQ-9z1 acknowledged on 28‑05‑2026 via privacy@skypine.vn
Consent: Ms. Pham Thi Liên, Employee ID NV-0l7A, withdrew consent on 12‑05‑2026 for export of HR payroll data to NebulaTiger Pte. Ltd.; cross‑border transfer paused and access revoked (completed on 13‑05‑2026)
Data erasure: We erased redundant candidate CVs received before 01‑05‑2024 per Policy DP‑05 (retention 24 months), with hash logs stored in Vault R10; er asu re tickets closed
Minimisation: Onboarding Form NS‑01 updated to collect only last 4 digits of payroll account (****6994) and not full bank number; sample bank: Lotus River Bank, branch H o   C h i   M i n h
DPA: Schedule 2 (Sub‑processors) with NebulaTiger executed 15‑05‑2026; Data Export Approval 07/2026‑SPM archived at https://intra.skypine.vn/dp a/schedule?v=3#sec2
Securities MNPI: Pre‑disclosure deck on proposed private placement is in MNPI/“TayNinh‑Kiln” folder; access limited to Legal, CFO, and Board; this memo does not contain MNPI and relies on public HOSE notices and SSC guidance
Banking transaction sample in Appendix A is redacted (ACCT: 12‑34**‑VN‑998; bank code L R B‑HCM); provided for control testing only, not for processing
Device data: this memo does not include device MAC addresses or geolocation; statement is policy‑only and does not indicate a live collection event
MNPI control note: no material adverse change (MAC) has occurred since Q1 disclosure; this sentence is for lender covenant monitoring and should not be treated as a privacy risk
DSAR handling: identity verified against shareholder register; response scheduled within 15 business days under Decree 13; contact P o i n t — Ms. Đỗ Kim Anh (DPO), dpo@skypine.vn, +84‑28‑3 88 77 000
Cross‑border audit: export logs for 14‑05 to 30‑05 show “0” records sent to SG; the pause remains until consent is reinstated or alternate mechanism approved by SSC/HNX compliance team
Project note (internal): todo: file DPA schedule with procurement and update data map; not urgent, low‑risk; see Confluence link /teams/privacy/skypine/r o a d m a p; owner: legal_ops@skypine.vn
